positive: A minimalist, highly stylized representation of a mountain landscape merging with abstract celestial elements. The composition features clean, geometric mountain peaks in deep navy and charcoal silhouettes, contrasted sharply against a vibrant gradient sky of amethyst, turquoise, and gold. Abstract constellations and stylized lunar cycles should fill the void, forming repeating, elegant geometric patterns. The overall style should be a blend of Art Deco symmetry and modern flat graphic design, optimized for screen printing on fabric. Strong, clean outlines, high contrast, central focus, symmetrical composition, vector art feel, suitable for repeating apparel print.
negative: low resolution, blurry, noisy, watermark, text, logo, signature, gradient bleeding, dirty, messy, jpeg artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, depth of field, photo-realistic, photographic
